chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rules for Those Prevented (mahsur) or Obstructed (masdood)

text: 3105 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلْمَحْصُورُ وَ اَلْمُضْطَرُّ يَنْحَرَانِ بَدَنَتَيْهِمَا فِي اَلْمَكَانِ اَلَّذِي يُضْطَرَّانِ فِيهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3105 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "The Mahsur (prevented) and the Mudtarr (compelled) should slaughter their sacrificial camels in the place where they are compelled to stop."
